title: hieracium olivaceum subsp. cupulatum
intro: Hieracium olivaceum subsp. cupulatum, also known as Hawkweed or Hieracium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems, as well as to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Hieracium can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits.
